description: Global Business Cycle engine v2.0 — synthetic CLI from Yahoo Finance equity momentum across 34 economies + FRED CCI/BCI for USA+CHN. Outputs current state (data/global-business-cycle.json) AND 5y weekly history (data/global-business-cycle-history.json). 4-phase classification + GDP-weighted regional/global aggregation + interpretation + cross-asset signals. Schedule: daily 12:00 UTC.

schedule.description: Daily run of synthetic CLI engine — current state + history
